name: API Demo
description:
Basic API description for statistics and events. In case of a live session, fire requests every X seconds (depending on your needs) to get updated live data.

player_id: Kinexon internal, unique identifier
league_id: Secondary identifier. Can be set to 3rd party player identifier.

Units:
Speeds: meters/second
Accelerations: meters/second^2
Distances/Coordinates: meters
